Exterior Wash Service

Hand Washed. Done Right.

Automatic car washes leave swirl marks and miss the details. Our hand wash service treats every panel with care, using proper techniques and professional products to clean your paint safely and thoroughly.

We clean and dress the wheels and tires, clean all windows inside and out, and wipe down door jambs and trim. Add our wax service for extra protection and a deeper shine that lasts weeks.

Exterior Wash
From $80
Hand wash, wheels, tires, windows & door jambs
Wax Add-On
+$30
Professional spray wax, 2–3 months protection

+$30
Removes bonded contaminants & iron particles for silky smooth paint

Full Exterior Package

Wash + wax + paint decon — save $10

What's Included

Every Exterior Wash Includes

🚿

Hand Wash

Every panel carefully hand washed using the two-bucket method to prevent swirl marks.

💿

Wheel & Tire Cleaning

Wheels scrubbed clean and tires dressed for a deep, rich black finish.

🪟

Window Cleaning

All exterior glass cleaned streak-free for crystal-clear visibility.

🚪

Door Jambs

Door jambs wiped down — the detail most people miss.

✨

Wax Protection — +$30

Professional spray wax applied for a deep, slick shine and up to 2–3 months of paint protection.

🧲

Paint Decontamination — +$30

Full decontamination treatment that removes bonded contaminants, brake dust, and embedded iron particles — leaving paint silky smooth and properly prepped.
